# Agent API Documentation

This documentation covers the core modules that make up the agent's API and user interface layer. These modules define the data types, state management logic, and UI components used to build and interact with the agent system.

## Modules

| Module | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| [`ui/api.ts`](ui/api) | Client-side API utilities for communicating with the agent backend. |
| [`ui/App.tsx`](ui/App) | Root React application component that bootstraps the agent UI. |
| [`api/store.ts`](api/store) | State management store for handling agent data and application state. |
| [`api/types.ts`](api/types) | Shared type definitions and interfaces used across the agent API. |
